name: Jerked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinade by combining the diced habaneros or serranos, peeled ginger root, lime juice, olive oil, allspice, cardamom, cumin, and nutmeg in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
3. Place chicken pieces in a resealable plastic bag or container.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring it is fully coated.
5. Seal the bag or cover the container and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, preferably overnight.
6. Remove the chicken from the marinade, discarding any remaining liquid.
7. Pat the chicken dry with paper towels.
8. Place the chicken on a wire rack over a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Refrigerate for an additional 4 to 6 hours or until completely chilled.
10. Once ready to cook, preheat the oven to 200°F (93°C).
11. Thread the chicken onto skewers and place them in the oven.
12. Cook for 2 to 3 hours, turning the skewers occasionally to ensure even drying.
13. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving or refrigerating for later use.
